notes: Promoted to active on 2026-05-10; scope locked on 2026-05-31 to the NYC vault/endow sprint.
Public withdrawal is the first implementation slice; do not let deferred Donate recovery block the /fund management fix.
Wallet Endow remains visible while the public /fund management panel is built.
Public Donate and Card Donate are deferred to separate future non-Cookie-Jar scope; do not expose Donate on /fund for this sprint.
Card Endow remains in scope but hidden until recovered-wallet ownership, vault-share verification, public visibility, and successful withdrawal proof pass.
Funding lane matrix is explicit: Wallet Endow remains wallet-owned; Manage Endowments is public account-gated; Donate is deferred; Card Endow is ownership/share/withdrawal-gated.
Low-level Cookie Jar hooks/contracts are preserved in this pass; only the public /fund sprint surface hides Donate.
Provider proof entries must be exact by intent, Garden destination, token, chain, and method; Card Donate proof never unlocks Card Endow.
/fund?manage=endowments must not carry receipt tokens, wallet addresses, emails, or provider identifiers.
Public withdraw preview must use the same 1% max-loss default as the withdraw mutation.
No existing-position migration, public address lookup, fiat off-ramp, contract work, or indexer schema work is planned.

Local validation on 2026-05-31 passed git diff whitespace check, JSON parsing, lint:vocab, and check:design-tokens; package tests, check:design-generated, and ci-local remain blocked in this worktree because dependencies are not installed.
Reusable vault crowdfunding UI skill work is tracked from this hub as related planning metadata, not as a new active automation lane.
Green Goods / NYC vaults are the first reusable-skill fixture; the future skill must remain portable for Octant and other public-goods vault communities.
Skill tracking parent PRD-569 and children PRD-570 through PRD-573 cover inputs, DesignMD fixture/template, wallet-first vault runtime, and provider/create-vault extension boundaries.

Skill tracking validation on 2026-05-31 passed status JSON parse, public-endowment linear-sync manifest with zero warnings, and Linear read-back; full plan-hub validate is blocked by unrelated sentry-stack-observability schema drift.
status.json is authoritative; branch names are automation signals.
.plans/ is the durable repo truth; any tool-local or .claude/agent-memory surface stays environment-local until freshness and ownership rules exist.

ui.handoff_note: Implement and verify /fund My Endowments UI without waiting on deferred Donate recovery. Keep visibility account-gated, wire /fund?manage=endowments, keep Donate absent from /fund, and add i18n.

state_api.handoff_note: Own the shared public endowment-position hook/type, safe max-loss preview parity, public withdraw reuse boundaries, exact provider-proof separation, and Card Endow receiver-address/share-verification gates. Donate is deferred out of this sprint.

contracts.handoff_note: No Solidity, deployment, or indexer schema work is planned for this recovery hub.

tdd.note: The plan uses existing vault deposit reads and withdrawal mechanics; no contract lane is planned.

qa_pass_1.handoff_note: Review public /fund withdrawal UX, account-gated visibility, /fund?manage=endowments receipt return path, mobile layout, i18n, and Card Endow hidden state.

qa_pass_2.handoff_note: Re-run targeted validation, inspect provider proof gates, and confirm no unrelated funding/PWA/admin work was pulled in.

history.note: Recorded the public endowment withdrawal recovery plan, card Donate recovery lane, Card Endow gate, and no-contract boundary.
Deep review tightened public management deeplink, safe withdraw preview parity, Thirdweb webhook/current-docs requirement, and Card Endow receiver-address gate.
Second deep audit tightened funding lane matrix, Card Donate Cookie Jar proof, exact provider-proof scope, Card Endow share verification, receipt privacy, and stale docs/design truth targets.
Moved feature hub from backlog to active
Updated Markdown plan truth after active promotion and verified Linear sync manifest has no warnings.
Locked NYC sprint to Wallet Endow, public Manage Endowments, and hidden-gated Card Endow; deferred Donate to separate future non-Cookie-Jar scope.
Passed diff whitespace, JSON parse, lint:vocab, and check:design-tokens; package tests and ci-local blocked by missing node_modules/vitest/js-yaml/tool binaries.
Recorded reusable vault crowdfunding UI skill tracking in local plan metadata and Linear parent/child issues PRD-569 through PRD-573.

Status JSON parsed, public-endowment linear-sync manifest returned zero warnings, and Linear read-back confirmed PRD-569 children and PRD-435/PRD-487 comments. Full plan-hub validate remains blocked by unrelated sentry-stack-observability hub schema drift.
